name: Flix The Flea
short_description: Inspired by the legendary ZX Spectrum classic Bugaboo (La Pulga), Flix the Flea is a precision arcade platformer where every jump counts. Master momentum, bounce through deadly caverns, and conquer ten challenging levels in this deceptively simple but brutally addictive skill game.
detailed_description:
Inspired by the legendary 1983 ZX Spectrum classic Bugaboo (La Pulga), Flix the Flea is a modern reimagining of one of gaming’s earliest precision jumping challenges.

Created with the blessing of Bugaboo’s original creator, Flix the Flea keeps the spirit of the classic alive while bringing smooth scrolling, modern presentation and new levels to the experience.

Simple to learn but tricky to master, Flix’s unique jump mechanics challenge players to carefully control momentum to escape dangerous caverns filled with hazards. Every jump matters — and a single mistake can send you tumbling back down.

With its pick-up-and-play design and arcade-style challenge, Flix the Flea captures the feel of classic skill-based games where practice, patience and precision are the keys to success.

Features

• Inspired by the ZX Spectrum classic Bugaboo (La Pulga)
• Precision jumping gameplay built around momentum mechanics
• 10 challenging levels to master
• Smooth scrolling and modern presentation
• Fast pick-up-and-play arcade gameplay
• Designed for quick runs and repeated attempts
